title: Adevinta
summary: During Adevinta's split into independent companies, led technical delivery for the housing vertical (Fotocasa / Realia). Built an algorithm that migrated every Adobe Analytics report — bespoke logic and all — into GA4, with zero loss of data or business-critical metrics.

beats.title: Adobe, and a split looming
beats.caption: Adevinta was splitting into independent companies; the housing vertical needed every Adobe Analytics report moved to GA4.

beats.title: What actually matters
beats.caption: Paired with a business analyst to interview report owners and pin down exactly which metrics were essential.

beats.title: An algorithm, not by hand
beats.caption: Built an algorithm that migrated every report automatically — including the bespoke, report-specific logic no template covered.

beats.title: Into GA4, zero loss
beats.caption: Every report rebuilt in GA4, owned end to end, with zero loss of data or business-critical metrics.
